title: Move booking requests to bottom of organiser dashboard

requirements.text: In the OrganizerDashboard page, reorder the dashboard sections so that the booking requests section appears after (below) both the events section and the portfolio image upload section. The final order from top to bottom should be: (1) profile view/edit, (2) events, (3) portfolio image upload, (4) booking requests.

quotes: in organisers dashboard the booking requests are above the events and portfolio image upload option, shift it at the end, I want booking requests in the bottom.

acceptanceCriteria: The organiser dashboard renders the booking requests section as the last section on the page.
The events section and portfolio image upload section appear above the booking requests section.
Profile view/edit remains at the top of the dashboard.
No other dashboard functionality or styling is changed.

nonGoals: Changing any booking request functionality or logic.
Modifying the guest dashboard or any other page.
Altering the visual styling of any dashboard section.
